title: Boom Matt
summary: This is my version of the mobile game Boom Dots by Umbrella Games , made this one Saturday evening in 2015 using Phaser HTML5 game framework just to see what it was like. Works on mobile, of course. Play in your browser: gingerbeardman.itch.io/boom-matt
content:
This is my version of the mobile game Boom Dots by Umbrella Games, made this one Saturday evening in 2015 using Phaser HTML5 game framework just to see what it was like.

Works on mobile, of course.

Play in your browser: gingerbeardman.itch.io/boom-matt
